_comment: Thunder Celestial Temple (雷仙殿) — the seat of the Thunder Celestial title within the Thunder Celestial Realm. Canon (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L54; CANON_RI_TIMELINE.md E24, E94): Site of Wang Lin's Thunder Celestial Tournament victory; he kills Russell here and becomes the Thunder Celestial of the Thunder Celestial Temple. The Blood Ancestor is slain here (E94). Wang Lin obtains the God-Slaying War Chariot, the Celestial Emperor Crown, and Bai Fan's Collection Pavilion inheritance here. The Temple is a vast lightning-wreathed complex with the Thunder Lake trial grounds, the Collection Pavilion, and the Celestial Slaughter Art trap site (All-Seer's tainted transmission). Stand-in: village town_center + woodland mansion (lightning-aspect grand complex). Final: custom Thunder Celestial Temple NBT templates with thunder-aspect halls, Collection Pavilion, and Thunder Lake. Biome: thunder_celestial_realm.
